name: Kuma Katana
desc: Fast, balanced red plasma katana. Charge to erupt a burning plasma-flame field over the swipe zone.
tag: Vibekilla — fast, balanced red plasma katana. CHARGED: erupts a plasma-flame field that burns the swipe zone.

name: Kraken Lash
desc: Longest reach, narrow arc, low damage. Charge for chain lightning that leaps between nearby Mumus.
tag: Kraken — longest reach, narrow arc, low damage. CHARGED: chain lightning that leaps between nearby Mumus.

name: Ourbie's Scythe
desc: Wide-reaping green scythe. Charge to hurl a green black hole that pulls Mumus together for the kill.
tag: Ourbit — a wide-reaping green scythe. CHARGED: hurls a green black hole that sucks Mumus in, grouping them for the kill.

name: Vault Hammer
desc: Widest arc, slow crowd-control. Charge for a shockwave that flings Mumus into the walls to detonate.
tag: Emblem Vault — widest arc crowd-control, slow. CHARGED: a shockwave that flings Mumus into the walls, where they detonate.

name: Badger Claws
desc: Fastest swings, low damage each. Charge for a thousand-strike flurry that mows down everything ahead.
tag: Honey Badger — fastest swings, low damage each. CHARGED: a thousand-strike flurry that mows everything in front of me.
